calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DEBORAH MARCHI'S Motion To Vacate Default Judgment.
APPEARANCE: Robert M. Sellards, Esq. of Stuhr & Miller 585-2122 for pltf & opposing party; Robert S. Fletcher, Esq. 356-9822 for deft & moving party. (Deft did not comply with the tentative ruling rule, however the Court proceeded to hear oral argument.)
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Personal service was properly effected. Order signed in open court. (301/EHG/CK) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
